title: Vietnamese-Style Pickled Beans
description: A simple and flavorful side dish made with pickled long beans and a variety of Vietnamese spices.
instructions: Cut the long beans into 1-inch pieces and place them in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the piquant sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar.
Pour the sauce mixture over the long beans and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with chopped cilantro and scallions if desired.
Serve the pickled long beans chilled or at room temperature.
